conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The wifi in the coffee shop I like to work from has been spotty.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I finally got around to donating some old clothes I never wear.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We need ProjectState to show current decision status, but nothing today tracks which project phase a decision belongs to.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My neighbor's dog barked most of the afternoon, hard to get anything done with the window open.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Could infer phase from how recently a decision was mentioned -- recent mentions imply current phase.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The bus was running about ten minutes late again this morning.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Recency of mention isn't the same as current relevance -- a decision made once and never revisited is still current. Build ProjectState purely as a projection of DecisionMetadata.status instead, and leave phase/identity tracking out of scope for now.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I finally fixed the wobbly chair leg in the kitchen.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: There's a new bakery opening down the street next month.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Constraint: ProjectStateBuilder must only read fields that are MEMORY_DIRECT or DETERMINISTIC -- never infer status from anything an LLM produced.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My phone battery has been draining faster than usual lately.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Blocked: some KnowledgeObjects are beliefs, not decisions, and beliefs don't have a status field to project.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to renew my passport before it expires this winter.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The gym was way more crowded than usual today.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Decided: filter to MemoryType.DECISION objects before projecting status; beliefs are handled by a separate WorkingContext tier, not ProjectState. Unblocks the builder.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I switched to a different brand of coffee and I'm not sure I like it.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Implemented ProjectStateBuilder.build() as a pure projection over DecisionMetadata.status for MemoryType.DECISION objects.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: It's supposed to rain most of next week according to the forecast.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Wired ProjectState into query_structured(), rendered only when the ContextPlan classifies as TaskMode.CONTINUATION.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I still haven't unpacked the last box from the move.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My sister's flight got delayed by a couple of hours.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Open question (explicitly out of scope for now): should ProjectState eventually track project phase/milestones? Not solving that here.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The office plants finally got watered after being neglected for weeks.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Next: add a Decisions/SupersededDecisions split test that confirms a superseded decision never appears in the current-decisions list.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I keep meaning to update my resume but haven't gotten around to it.

ground_truth.current_objective: Implement ProjectStateBuilder as a deterministic projection of decision status, no phase/milestone tracking yet.
active_decisions: Build ProjectState as a pure projection of DecisionMetadata.status, not inferred from mention recency.
Filter to MemoryType.DECISION objects before projecting status; beliefs go through WorkingContext instead.
superseded_or_rejected: Inferring project phase from how recently a decision was mentioned.
constraints: ProjectStateBuilder must only read MEMORY_DIRECT or DETERMINISTIC fields, never infer status from LLM output.
active_tasks: Add a Decisions/SupersededDecisions split test confirming superseded decisions never appear as current.
open_questions: Should ProjectState eventually track project phase/milestones? (explicitly deferred, not being solved now)
ground_truth.top_priority_next_action: Add a test confirming ProjectStateBuilder's Decisions/SupersededDecisions split never shows a superseded decision as current.
resolved_blockers: Beliefs not having a status field to project the same way decisions do.

queries.text: What should we work on next?

must_state: Build ProjectState as a pure projection of DecisionMetadata.status, not inferred from mention recency.
Filter to MemoryType.DECISION objects before projecting status; beliefs go through WorkingContext instead.
ProjectStateBuilder must only read MEMORY_DIRECT or DETERMINISTIC fields, never infer status from LLM output.
must_not_state: Inferring project phase from how recently a decision was mentioned, as a current or recommended approach
Beliefs not having a status field to project the same way decisions do, as still open/blocking
forbidden_actions: Recommending that ProjectState infer phase or status from mention recency instead of DecisionMetadata.status.
must_prioritize: Add a test confirming ProjectStateBuilder's Decisions/SupersededDecisions split never shows a superseded decision as current.
